generic_rules: Repairs should target existing outputs or auxiliary variables; do not introduce new features.
Focus on fixing type mismatches or unresolved references reported by the validator.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helper variables in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings.
Declare helper variables with `eq name : type = expression;` or `const name : type = value;`
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scopes.
Avoid introducing new architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on expression correction.
Do not attempt to repair syntax errors outside the `annex agree` block.
